input.initialPrompt: I only want to run the integration tests in this project. How do I filter for just the Integration category?

data.reasoningText: The user wants to know how to filter for just the Integration category tests in their .NET test project. Let me look at the test files to understand the project structure and test categories.

data.content:
This is an MSTest project using `[TestCategory]` attributes. To run only the Integration tests, use the `--filter` option:

```
dotnet test --filter TestCategory=Integration
```

This will run the 3 tests tagged with `[TestCategory("Integration")]`: `CreateOrder_SavesInDatabase`, `CreateOrder_SendsNotification`, and `ProcessPayment_GatewayTimeout_Retries`.
